note: No video bundler configured. Set EXTERNAL_VIDEO_WEBHOOK for production or BUNDLE_PROVIDER=ffmpeg (plus `npm i ffmpeg-static fluent-ffmpeg`) for local dev.
title: The Monk on Fire
hook: He sat down, closed his eyes... and set himself on fire.
script: On June 11, 1963, a seventy-three-year-old Buddhist monk did the unthinkable. He sat in the lotus position at a busy Saigon intersection — and lit himself on fire. He didn't scream. He didn't move. The flames consumed him in total silence. Photographer Malcolm Browne captured the photo that shocked the world. It forced President Kennedy to act — and changed a war forever.
